target_brief: Create an OPL-compatible book authoring Foundry Agent that turns source material into a coherent book. The workflow has two core parts: first shape the storyline, then materialize the book as chapters, illustrations, tables, layout, and quality-controlled handoff. The agent must preserve content consistency, writing style consistency, evidence grounding, affirmative human prose, illustration and table plans, typography checks, and owner-gated publication decisions.
